data.title: Phoenix Children's Foundation Halves Its Prospecting Time with ZoomInfo
data.description: In Vancouver, ZoomInfo (GTM) announced that Phoenix Children's Foundation, associated with a highly acclaimed pediatric hospital, reduced its average prospecting time by 50% and secured new donations from fresh partners after implementing ZoomInfo. Launching in 1983 with 124 beds, Phoenix Children's now offers services in over 75 pediatric subspecialties. This success was achieved within two quarters of utilizing ZoomInfo's AI GTM platform.

data.title: TrendAI™ Adopts Claude Opus 5 to Advance Vulnerability Prioritization, Assessment, and Virtual Patching
data.description: TrendAI is a part of Anthropic's Cyber Verification Program, utilizing advanced reasoning to transform vulnerability intelligence into rapid protection for hybrid environments. The company, a leading enterprise AI security provider from Trend Micro, is based in Dallas. This information was disclosed on July 24, 2026.

data.title: FDA Approves TYLENOL® with Naproxen, the First and Only Over-the-Counter Fixed-Dose Combination of Acetaminophen (650 mg) and Naproxen Sodium (220 mg)
data.description: A new medication called TYLENOL® with Naproxen has been found to be clinically effective without the use of opioids. This fixed-dose combination starts working in less than 30 minutes and offers 12 hours of pain relief in just one dose. It is the first and only FDA-approved over-the-counter medication that combines acetaminophen and naproxen sodium. This provides a wider range of options for pain relief for consumers.

data.title: First Horizon Bank and Charlotte Hornets to Distribute 10,000 Basketballs to Boys & Girls Clubs Across The Carolinas Through Bee-Ball For All Presented By First Horizon Bank
data.description: The Second Annual Impacting the Carolinas Campaign has been launched by Signature Youth Initiative, with First Horizon Bank being named as the Presenting Partner of Bee-Ball For All in Charlotte, North Carolina. The announcement was made on July 24, 2026. First Horizon Bank, also known by its NYSE ticker symbol FHN, will be partnering with the Charlotte Hornets for this initiative.

data.title: International Self-Care Day: Dimora Medical Highlights Wound Care as an Essential Part of Everyday Self-Care
data.description: On July 24, 2026, in New York, the focus on International Self-Care Day highlights the significance of upholding health at all times. The idea of 24/7 self-care is increasingly popular among individuals looking for proactive ways to enhance their daily well-being. This trend resonates with consumers who aim to prioritize self-care practices throughout the day and night.

data.title: Procter & Gamble Brings Disaster Relief to West Virginia Residents Affected by Flash Flooding
data.description: P&G, in collaboration with Matthew 25: Ministries and Walmart, is offering on-site shower facilities and free laundry services through Tide Loads of Hope in Buckhannon, West Virginia. This initiative is part of the P&G Disaster Relief Program, providing essential relief by deploying mobile laundry services, hot showers, and personal care items to those in need. The program aims to support the community by offering these services at no cost.

data.title: CoolFly Brings Electric Personal Aircraft to EAA AirVenture Oshkosh 2026
data.description: In Oshkosh, Wisconsin on July 24, 2026, CoolFly, a company specializing in electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) personal aircraft, is debuting its Dream ST model at EAA AirVenture Oshkosh. The aircraft will be showcased at Booth V13 during the event running from July 20 to July 26.

data.title: cbdMD Supports the Bipartisan Lawful Hemp Protection Act to Protect Consumers and Full-Spectrum CBD Access
data.description: A leading company based in Charlotte, North Carolina, recently announced its endorsement of the Barr-Craig framework and the government's push to amend the federal hemp definition prior to the November cutoff. cbdMD, Inc. (NYSE American: YCBD), renowned for its hemp-derived wellness products, expressed its full support for this initiative on July 24, 2026.

data.title: Canadian Hockey Leaders Bring NHL Expertise to India Through Inaugural India Hockey 360 Festival
data.description: In Chandigarh, India, from July 31 to August 2, 2026, the first-ever India Hockey 360 Festival will be led by NHL broadcaster Randip Janda and Abbotsford Canucks Assistant Coach Harry Mahesh. The festival is set to feature a series of events promoting hockey and will be co-organized by the two prominent figures.

data.title: "Has Anyone Tried Beverly Hills MD Deep Wrinkle Filler?" Read Reviews, Ingredients, Benefits & Results Here
data.description: With over 600 five-star reviews, the Beverly Hills MD Deep Wrinkle Filler is gaining popularity among consumers seeking an effective solution for deep wrinkles, crow's feet, forehead lines, and lip lines. The product, based in Beverly Hills, California, has attracted significant attention as more individuals prioritize skincare. The rising demand reflects the growing interest in top-quality wrinkle fillers for various areas of the face.

data.title: Okuma America Corporation to Exhibit at IMTS 2026 with Comprehensive Lineup
data.description: Okuma America Corporation, a global company based in Charlotte, North Carolina, will showcase a range of innovative offerings at an event on July 24, 2026. The event will introduce newly designed machines, open-architecture CNC control systems, multiple automation solutions, and intelligent technologies. In addition, the company will highlight its world-class services, sustainable initiatives, and more. This showcase will demonstrate Okuma's commitment to cutting-edge technology and customer satisfaction.

data.title: ImageTrend CFO John Wolfenden Accepted Into Forbes Finance Council
data.description: A finance leader was recently chosen by an exclusive professional community in Eagan, Minnesota, on July 24, 2026. This individual was selected based on the extensive and diverse range of experiences he brings to the table. ImageTrend, a key player in offering software and AI intelligence solutions for emergency response, healthcare, and public safety sectors, played a pivotal role in this selection process.
